# Buy a House After Bankruptcy - FHA & VA Loan Guide [2026] - House After BK
> How soon can you buy a house after bankruptcy? FHA, VA, and conventional loan waiting periods, credit rebuilding steps, and 2026 mortgage...

## About
buyahouseafterbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
